copy.owner_bio: When you need a reliable concrete contractor professional, look no further. R.A. Works Concrete LLC. takes pride in delivering quality work and honest service to homeowners in Waukegan, IL. Whether it's a small repair or a major project, we're here to get the job done right the first time.

reviews.author: michelle kusher
reviews.text: RA Works provided excellent quality with our large residential concrete patio project. Richard is professional in his dealings, very knowledgeable, and explained everything in detail.  They did what they said they'd do in a timely fashion.  I highly recommend them, and would hire them again for future projects.
